title: About Me
description: I am a technical product leader with 10+ years of experience in internet product management, specialising in AI and IoT solutions. I lead product strategy at Loadshift (Australia's largest freight marketplace) and have led key projects at companies such as Alibaba, from concept to launch for smart cockpits, hybrid AI service desks, and warehouse video intelligent inspection systems, while promoting technological innovation and social inclusion.

skills.title: Product Planning
skills.description: Led key projects from concept to launch

skills.title: Team Management
skills.description: Coordinated cross-functional teams for efficient delivery
